name: scope-creep-detection
description: Monitor project scope changes, detect unauthorized expansion, quantify impact, and recommend corrective actions
objectives: Compare current task list against original scoping document
Detect tasks added after initial scope was approved
Quantify scope expansion in effort hours and timeline impact
Categorize additions as legitimate change requests vs uncontrolled creep
Recommend corrective action (accept, defer, remove, re-scope)
Generate scope change report for stakeholder review
prerequisites: Original scoping document with defined requirements exists
Baseline task count and effort estimate available

procedure.description: Compare current state against original scope
commands: LOAD original scoping document requirements
QUERY all current tasks including recently added
DIFF current tasks against baseline requirements
IDENTIFY tasks not traceable to original requirements
CALCULATE net addition in task count and effort
procedure.expectedOutput: Delta report: original scope vs current scope

commands: CLASSIFY additions: approved change request, bug fix, missed requirement, pure creep
CHECK if additions went through change control process
IDENTIFY who added the scope and when
ASSESS business justification for each addition
FLAG additions without approval or justification
procedure.expectedOutput: Classified list of scope changes with approval status

procedure.description: Quantify impact of scope changes on timeline and resources
commands: CALCULATE total additional effort from scope changes
PROJECT new completion date including additions
ASSESS impact on team workload and capacity
IDENTIFY dependencies affected by scope changes
DETERMINE if critical path has shifted
procedure.expectedOutput: Impact report with revised timeline projection

procedure.description: Propose corrective actions for scope management
commands: RECOMMEND action per addition: accept, defer to next phase, remove, negotiate
PROPOSE revised timeline if scope accepted
SUGGEST scope trade-offs (add X, defer Y)
DRAFT change request for stakeholder approval
DEFINE guardrails to prevent future uncontrolled creep
procedure.expectedOutput: Action plan with options for stakeholder decision

criteria: All scope additions identified and classified
Impact quantified in hours and days

testScenarios.test: Project with >30% task increase vs baseline

successIndicators: Scope creep detected before it impacts deadlines
Stakeholders informed of scope changes proactively
Corrective action taken before project goes off-track

commonErrors.solution: Use initial task list as baseline, flag lack of formal scope

commonErrors.error: Cannot distinguish between bug fixes and scope creep
commonErrors.solution: Apply heuristic: if task addresses existing feature = bug fix, new feature = creep

escalationCriteria: Scope expanded >25% without any change requests
Scope changes affect committed deliverables to clients

successMetrics.name: Detection Speed
successMetrics.measurement: Time from scope addition to detection

agentInterfaces.message: Fetch current task list and historical changes for scope analysis
Alert stakeholders of significant scope creep detected
